title: Vivi Faces the Warlord
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on vivi faces the warlord, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Faces the Warlord. Crocodile defeats Luffy and leaves him to die, while Vivi and the crew race toward the capital without their captain. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ONami! Did you fall in love with me just now?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah, I fell for you. Now get this cage open already!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: qles, darling!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: There's no limit to his stupidity...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Good job!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How do you know what you mean?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thanks!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Grrr!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Grrr!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: C'mon Sanji! Beat the crap out of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you all want a piece of me, do you...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Grrr!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So be it. Come at me, you worthless bananas.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'll gladly kick some table manners.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Into anyone boorish enough to harm a lady...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: SANJII! There's not much time left! Finish them off in a second!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: No, more like half a second!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Tell your friend to go after the 3rd one to enter the room just now...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What, can you tell them apart?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Are your ears just for show or something?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: That 3rd one had the exact same growl as the one that swallowed the key.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Got it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So they destroyed the bridge to buy a little time, did they...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There must have been several more of their crew members still left!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And they thought they could lure me away from the room?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In any case, all their resistance is for naught...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even if they're lucky enough to find the right crocodile and have it spit the key back out,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They'll never get that cage open...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Because the real key,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Was here all along,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But struggle as much as you wish before your deaths...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...You're quite the villain.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Enough is enough!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll kill these worthless runts personally!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Creek...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: See ya later, Dumbass-gator -Mr. Prince-

summary: This part develops vivi faces the warlord and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
